questionHtml: Using your answers to parts (c)(ii) and (d)(ii), give a reason why Spring 1 might make a better shock absorber than Spring 2.
markschemeHtml:
spring 1 is better as it gives a smoother ride (less oscillations, less bouncy)          R1

[1 mark]
